headerDisplay: Homebridge plugin for creating delay/timer switches and sensors for delayed actions/automations

delay.title: Delay Time in Milliseconds
delay.description: Amount of time in milliseconds to wait from when the switch is turned ON until the switch will be turned OFF and the sensor(s) will trigger

disableSensor.title: Disable Extra Motion Sensor
disableSensor.description: Enable if you do not want to use the motion sensor. The motion sensor detects motion for 3 seconds when the delay switch turns off

disableContactSensor.title: Disable Extra Contact Sensor
disableContactSensor.description: Enable if you do not want to use the contact sensor. The contact sensor can be configured in different modes, see below

contactSensorMode.title: Contact Sensor Mode
contactSensorMode.description: Select the desired contact sensor mode

oneOf.title: Contact open when delay switch is on
Contact closed when delay switch is on
Contact open only for 3 seconds after delay switch turns off
Contact closed only for 3 seconds after delay switch turns off

disableOccupancySensor.title: Disable Extra Occupancy Sensor
disableOccupancySensor.description: Enable if you do not want to use the occupancy sensor. The occupancy sensor can be configured in different modes, see below

occupancySensorMode.title: Occupancy Sensor Mode
occupancySensorMode.description: Select the desired occupancy sensor mode

oneOf.title: Occupancy detected when delay switch is on
Occupancy detected when delay switch is off

startOnReboot.title: Turn ON when Homebridge Restarts
startOnReboot.description: When Enabled, the switch will be turned ON and start the timer when the Homebridge server restarts
